commit.message:
Fix stale deploy loading by excluding index.html from SW precache

After a deploy, the old service worker could serve a cached index.html
that references hashed chunks no longer in the new SW's precache,
causing the app to hang at the loading spinner until manual refresh.

- Remove html from workbox globPatterns so index.html is always fetched
  from the network, not the SW cache
- Set navigateFallback: null to prevent SW from intercepting navigation
  requests with a stale cached response
- Add chunk load error handler that auto-reloads once when a dynamic
  import fails (catches edge cases where stale HTML slips through)

feat!: overhaul data pipeline and scoring engine

BREAKING CHANGE: Remove vidéosurveillance CNIL 2012 data, remove winners.json
electoral references, and restructure prospection scoring.

- Remove outdated VS/CNIL 2012 vidéosurveillance from surveillance pipeline
- Remove winners.json references from frontend
- Add ONISR 2023-2024 road accident data as scoring signal
- Fix pm_growth with volume-weighted formula to reduce small-number noise
- Winsorize surveillance ratios at 50 agents/10k inhabitants
- Distinguish no-data vs zero-data communes in surveillance mode
- Move no_videoverb from scoring signal to filter-only
- Redistribute scoring weights: stat_payant(30), pop_sweet(25), pm_count(20), accidents(15), pm_growth(10)
- Add METHODOLOGIE.md documenting all data sources, formulas, and limits
- Update CLAUDE.md with current architecture

Initial commit: Pocket Caddy MVP

Full cross-platform golf caddy app built with Expo + React Native.

Features:
- Auth (email/password via Supabase)
- Course search via The Golf API
- Active round tracking with GPS map (react-native-maps)
- Per-hole shot logging (club, direction, outcome)
- AI club recommendations (Claude claude-sonnet-4-6 via Supabase Edge Function)
- Swing video capture + AI analysis (Claude Vision)
- Player profile with auto-learned club distances
- Post-round AI tendency summary (Claude Haiku)
- Round history with scoring stats

Tech stack: Expo Router, NativeWind, Zustand, TanStack Query, Supabase, Claude API

commit.message:
Fix click-to-navigate: extract function name from mermaid label (v2.0.18)

Mermaid labels like "extractReactDetails —\ncheck if node is React
component,\nextract hooks & JSX info" were being stored as sourceName,
which findCurrentLine() couldn't match against AST nodes. Now we extract
just the function name before the em-dash separator.

Also suppress benign ResizeObserver loop warning in webview error handler.

commit.message:
Add GUI, smart safety, threading, and voice confirmation

- Dark-mode floating tkinter window (always-on-top, draggable) shows
  live status: idle, listening, thinking, acting, confirming, speaking
- Smart safety: dangerous actions (delete/remove/trash/format) trigger
  voice confirmation "Are you sure?", safe actions execute immediately
- Threading: Jarvis loop runs in background thread, GUI stays responsive
- Voice confirmation: Jarvis says "Done" after completing click/type actions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: build CMS admin panel during website deploy on Render

The website server-static.js serves from admin/dist/ but the deploy
build command was only 'npm install', never building the CMS React app.
Now conditionally runs 'cd admin && npm install && npm run build' when
admin/package.json exists, so admin/dist/index.html is available at
runtime and the root route works.

- Contact form: "How did you hear about us?" dropdown with referral source tracking
- Homepage: sticky CTA bar and social proof quote between credibility bar and Sound Familiar
- Framework page: interactive quadrant diagram, colored pillar borders, cost-of-misalignment cards, pillar connector
- Google Sheets setup doc updated with new handlers and referral source column

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(phase-7): graduated autonomy with confidence scoring

Confidence scoring engine tracks approval rates per fix type.
Fix types auto-promote to auto-fix when >90% approval for 2+ weeks.
Auto-fixed issues reported in daily audit digest.
Anomaly detection reverts fix types to suggest+confirm if rate drops.
Users can undo auto-fixes via conversation.

CONV-06: Confidence scoring per fix type
CONV-07: Auto-promotion when approval rate sustained >90%
CONV-08: Auto-fix digest in daily audit
CONV-09: Anomaly detection and reversion
CONV-10: Undo auto-fixes via "undo that" or "revert X on Y"

commit.message:
fix: change pane cycling to Ctrl+]/Ctrl+[ and bump to 0.31.47

Ctrl+Tab is intercepted by Chromium before reaching JS in Tauri
webviews. Switch to Ctrl+] (forward) and Ctrl+[ (backward) which
reliably reach the key handler from terminals.

Also removes the bare Tab binding entirely — shell completion must
not be broken.

commit.message:
Unify -mode(system). and -stdlib. into single directive

Remove the separate -stdlib. directive — its only effect (suppressing
reduce/2 generation) is now handled by -mode(system). directly.
Parser maps -stdlib. to CompileMode.system, Module.isStdlib field
removed, compiler uses compileMode check. All .glp files updated.

Dart: 374+5skip-14fail  REPL: 382/382

commit.message:
Add unified agent documentation (AGENTS.md) for all AI tools

Central project docs in AGENTS.md, with pointers from CLAUDE.md,
.cursorrules, and .github/copilot-instructions.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: track subagent/Task dispatches in status and result (#106)

Add SubagentCall tracking to StatusInfo, ResultDetailInfo, and
PersistedResult. When the Claude agent dispatches subagents via the
Task or Agent tool, klaus now records:

- Subagent type (e.g. Explore, general-purpose)
- Description of the dispatched task
- Tool calls, tokens, and duration from the <usage> block
- Running/completed status

The tracker detects tool_use messages for Task/Agent tools, parses
the input arguments, and matches them to <usage> blocks in subsequent
messages to capture result metadata.

Closes #83

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Ingest 120 HSBC bank credits as self-contained facts

Bank transactions are facts - book immediately against the investment
receivable (known counterparty) or Assets:Suspense (unknown). Negative
receivable balances signal pending announcements, not errors.

- 120 entries across 2019-2026, all validate clean
- 3 existing entries correctly deduped (Electra #35, #36, Pollen Q3)
- 26 non-investment rows skipped (interest, transfers, etc.)
- FX rates fetched for all 108 transaction dates
- Receivable report shows 11 investments with pending announcements
- Updated ASSUMPTIONS.md: bank-facts-first model, suspense accounts,
  receivable balance report as primary anomaly detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: add nixpacks.toml for pnpm support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix performance analytics not updating after manual trades

updatePerformanceAnalytics() was not called from the manual buy/sell
paths, so best trade, worst trade, win rate etc. never refreshed.
